sentences.sentence: Bullying can take a variety of forms, from the verbal—being taunted or called hurtful names—to the physical—being kicked or shoved—as well as indirect forms, such as being excluded from social groups.
sentences.translation: 欺凌可以表现为多种形式，从言语欺凌——遭到嘲弄或被叫侮辱性绰号——到肢体欺凌——被踢或被推搡——还包括被社交群体排斥等间接形式。

structure.text: from the verbal—being taunted or called hurtful names—to the physical—being kicked or shoved—
such as being excluded from social groups

difficult_points: from... to... 列出言语与肢体欺凌两端，破折号中的被动动名词分别解释其具体表现。
as well as 补充第三类 indirect forms；such as 后用 being excluded 举例。
being taunted、called、kicked、shoved 和 excluded 都表达受害者遭受的被动行为。

sentences.sentence: A survey I conducted with Irene Whitney found that in British primary schools up to a quarter of pupils reported experience of bullying, which in about one in ten cases was persistent.
sentences.translation: 我与艾琳·惠特尼开展的一项调查发现，在英国小学中，多达四分之一的学生称自己经历过欺凌，其中约十分之一的案例属于持续性欺凌。

structure.text: that in British primary schools up to a quarter of pupils reported experience of bullying
which in about one in ten cases was persistent

difficult_points: A survey 后省略关系词 that/which，I conducted... 修饰 survey。
that 从句作 found 的宾语；up to a quarter 表示最高达到四分之一。
which 回指 bullying 或 bullying experience，说明其中约十分之一持续发生。

sentences.sentence: There was less bullying in secondary schools, with about one in twenty-five suffering persistent bullying, but these cases may be particularly recalcitrant.
sentences.translation: 中学里的欺凌较少，大约每25名学生中有1人遭受持续欺凌，但这类案例可能尤其顽固、难以解决。

structure.text: with about one in twenty-five suffering persistent bullying
but these cases may be particularly recalcitrant

difficult_points: There was 是存在句；with + 名词 + 现在分词补充中学生遭受持续欺凌的比例。
one in twenty-five 省略了 pupils，表示每25人中约1人。
recalcitrant 在此指欺凌案例顽固、难以通过干预解决。

sentences.sentence: Bullying is clearly unpleasant, and can make the child experiencing it feel unworthy and depressed.
sentences.translation: 欺凌显然令人痛苦，还会使遭受欺凌的孩子感到自己没有价值并陷入抑郁。
difficult_points: is 和 can make 是共用主语 Bullying 的并列谓语。
experiencing it 是现在分词短语，修饰 the child，it 回指 bullying。
make + 宾语 + 动词原形构成使役结构，feel 后的两个形容词描述孩子的感受。

sentences.sentence: In extreme cases it can even lead to suicide, though this is thankfully rare.
sentences.translation: 在极端情况下，欺凌甚至可能导致自杀，不过所幸这种情况很少见。
difficult_points: it 回指 bullying；even 强调自杀是最严重的潜在后果。
though 引导让步补充，this 指欺凌导致自杀的情况，thankfully 表达作者评价。

sentences.sentence: Victimised pupils are more likely to experience difficulties with interpersonal relationships as adults, while children who persistently bully are more likely to grow up to be physically violent, and convicted of anti-social offences.
sentences.translation: 受欺凌的学生成年后更容易在人际关系方面遇到困难，而长期欺凌他人的孩子长大后更可能使用暴力，并因反社会罪行被定罪。

structure.text: while children who persistently bully are more likely to grow up to be physically violent, and convicted of anti-social offences
to be physically violent, and convicted of anti-social offences

difficult_points: while 表示两类儿童长期后果的对照；who 修饰 children，并把 bully 用作主动动词“欺凌他人”。
be more likely to 表示更高概率，不等于必然发生。
to be 后并列 physically violent 和 convicted...；第二项可理解为 to be convicted 的省略。

sentences.sentence: Until recently, not much was known about the topic, and little help was available to teachers to deal with bullying.
sentences.translation: 直到最近，人们对这个问题仍了解不多，教师也几乎得不到处理欺凌问题的帮助。

structure.text: not much was known about the topic
and little help was available to teachers

difficult_points: not much 和 little 都表达否定数量，分别指知识不多和帮助很少。
was known 是被动语态，不强调了解这一主题的人。
to deal with bullying 后置说明 help 的用途。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps as a consequence, schools would often deny the problem.
sentences.translation: 也许正因如此，学校过去常常否认存在欺凌问题。
difficult_points: as a consequence 回指此前缺乏认识和应对帮助，说明学校否认问题的可能原因。
would often 表示过去反复出现的习惯性做法，不是条件句。

sentences.sentence: 'There is no bullying at this school' has been a common refrain, almost certainly untrue.
sentences.translation: “这所学校没有欺凌”一直是常见的说辞，而这种说法几乎肯定不真实。

structure.text: 'There is no bullying at this school'

difficult_points: 整段引语作为主语，因此 has been 使用单数形式。
refrain 在此指反复出现的固定说法；almost certainly untrue 是作者对该说法的补充判断。

expressions.meaning_zh: 常见且反复出现的说辞

sentences.sentence: Fortunately more schools are now saying: 'There is not much bullying here, but when it occurs we have a clear policy for dealing with it.'
sentences.translation: 所幸现在有更多学校会说：“这里的欺凌并不多，但一旦发生，我们有明确的处理政策。”

structure.text: 'There is not much bullying here, but when it occurs we have a clear policy for dealing with it.'

difficult_points: 冒号后整段直接引语是 saying 的内容。
引语中的第一个 it 指 bullying；when 从句表示欺凌一旦发生，第二个 it 也回指 bullying。
for dealing with it 修饰 policy，说明政策的用途。

sentences.sentence: Three factors are involved in this change.
sentences.translation: 促成这一变化的因素有三个。
difficult_points: this change 指学校从否认欺凌转向承认并制定应对政策。
be involved in 在这里表示三个因素参与并促成变化。

sentences.sentence: First is an awareness of the severity of the problem.
sentences.translation: 第一，是人们认识到了问题的严重性。

structure.text: an awareness of the severity of the problem

difficult_points: 这是列举式倒装，an awareness... 是实际要说明的第一个因素。
of the severity of the problem 逐层说明 awareness 的内容。

sentences.sentence: Second, a number of resources to help tackle bullying have become available in Britain.
sentences.translation: 第二，英国已经有了一批帮助应对欺凌问题的资源。
difficult_points: a number of + 复数名词作主语，谓语使用复数 have。
to help tackle... 后置修饰 resources；help 后的 tackle 省略 to。

sentences.sentence: For example, the Scottish Council for Research in Education produced a package of materials, Action Against Bullying, circulated to all schools in England and Wales as well as in Scotland in summer 1992, with a second pack, Supporting Schools Against Bullying, produced the following year.
sentences.translation: 例如，苏格兰教育研究委员会制作了一套名为《反欺凌行动》的材料，并于1992年夏发放到英格兰、威尔士和苏格兰的所有学校；第二套材料《支持学校反欺凌》则于次年推出。

structure.text: the Scottish Council for Research in Education
circulated to all schools in England and Wales as well as in Scotland in summer 1992
with a second pack, Supporting Schools Against Bullying, produced the following year

difficult_points: Action Against Bullying 是 a package of materials 的同位名称；circulated... 是过去分词短语，说明发放范围和时间。
as well as 连接 England and Wales 与 Scotland。
with + 名词 + 过去分词构成独立结构，补充第二套材料次年制作的情况。

sentences.sentence: In Ireland, Guidelines on Countering Bullying Behaviour in Post-Primary Schools was published in 1993.
sentences.translation: 在爱尔兰，《中学阶段学校反欺凌行为指南》于1993年出版。

structure.text: Guidelines on Countering Bullying Behaviour in Post-Primary Schools

difficult_points: Guidelines 虽以复数形式出现，但这里是单一出版物的书名，所以谓语用 was。
on Countering... 修饰 Guidelines，说明指南主题；Countering 是动名词。

sentences.sentence: Third, there is evidence that these materials work, and that schools can achieve something.
sentences.translation: 第三，有证据表明这些材料确实有效，学校能够有所作为。

structure.text: and that schools can achieve something

difficult_points: there is 是存在句；两个 that 从句并列，同位说明 evidence 的具体内容。
work 在这里表示材料“有效、起作用”；achieve something 表示学校能够取得实际成效。

sentences.sentence: This comes from carefully conducted 'before and after' evaluations of interventions in schools, monitored by a research team.
sentences.translation: 这一证据来自对学校干预措施认真开展的“前后对比”评估，而评估过程由研究团队监测。

structure.text: carefully conducted 'before and after' evaluations of interventions in schools

difficult_points: This 回指上一句证明材料有效、学校能改善欺凌的 evidence。
conducted 修饰 evaluations；monitored by... 也修饰评估过程，而不是 schools。
'before and after' 表示比较干预措施实施前后的状况。

sentences.sentence: In Norway, after an intervention campaign was introduced nationally, an evaluation of forty-two schools suggested that, over a two-year period, bullying was halved.
sentences.translation: 在挪威，一项干预行动在全国推行后，对42所学校的评估显示，在两年期间内，欺凌事件减少了一半。

structure.text: after an intervention campaign was introduced nationally
that, over a two-year period, bullying was halved

difficult_points: after 从句使用被动语态，说明干预行动在全国范围推出后才进行评估。
that 从句作 suggested 的宾语；over a two-year period 是插入的时间范围。
was halved 是被动语态，表示欺凌数量降至原来的一半。

sentences.sentence: The Sheffield investigation, which involved sixteen primary schools and seven secondary schools, found that most schools succeeded in reducing bullying.
sentences.translation: 谢菲尔德调查涉及16所小学和7所中学，结果发现大多数学校都成功减少了欺凌。

structure.text: which involved sixteen primary schools and seven secondary schools
that most schools succeeded in reducing bullying

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充调查覆盖的学校数量。
that 从句作 found 的宾语；succeed in 后接动名词 reducing。

sentences.sentence: Evidence suggests that a key step is to develop a policy on bullying, saying clearly what is meant by bullying, and giving explicit guidelines on what will be done if it occurs, what records will be kept, who will be informed, what sanctions will be employed.
sentences.translation: 证据表明，关键一步是制定欺凌问题政策，明确界定何为欺凌，并就欺凌发生后将采取什么措施、保留哪些记录、通知谁以及实施何种处罚给出清晰指南。

structure.text: that a key step is to develop a policy on bullying
saying clearly what is meant by bullying
and giving explicit guidelines on what will be done if it occurs, what records will be kept, who will be informed, what sanctions will be employed

difficult_points: that 从句给出证据支持的结论；to develop... 是表语，说明 key step 的内容。
saying 和 giving 是并列现在分词，补充政策应包含的内容。
on 后接四个并列间接疑问从句；if it occurs 中 it 指 bullying。

sentences.sentence: The policy should be developed through consultation, over a period of time—not just imposed from the head teacher's office!
sentences.translation: 政策应经过一段时间的协商逐步制定，而不应只是由校长办公室强行下达！

structure.text: not just imposed from the head teacher's office

difficult_points: should be developed 是情态动词加被动语态，说明理想的政策制定方式。
破折号后的 not just imposed 与 developed 对比，省略了 should be。
through consultation 和 over a period of time 分别说明方式与时间过程。

sentences.sentence: Pupils, parents and staff should feel they have been involved in the policy, which needs to be disseminated and implemented effectively.
sentences.translation: 学生、家长和教职员工都应感到自己参与了政策制定，而政策也需要得到有效传播和落实。

structure.text: they have been involved in the policy
which needs to be disseminated and implemented effectively

difficult_points: feel 后省略 that，引出宾语从句；they 回指 pupils, parents and staff。
which 指 the policy；to be disseminated and implemented 是两个并列被动不定式。

sentences.sentence: Other actions can be taken to back up the policy.
sentences.translation: 还可以采取其他行动来支持这项政策。
difficult_points: can be taken 是情态动词加被动语态，表示可采用多种配套措施。
to back up... 是目的状语；back up 在此指支持、加强政策效果。

sentences.sentence: There are ways of dealing with the topic through the curriculum, using video, drama and literature.
sentences.translation: 可以通过课程来处理这一主题，例如使用视频、戏剧和文学作品。

structure.text: ways of dealing with the topic

difficult_points: There are 是存在句；of dealing... 后置说明 ways 的具体内容。
through the curriculum 与 using... 都说明处理欺凌主题的方法，后者列举具体媒介。

sentences.sentence: These are useful for raising awareness, and can best be tied in to early phases of development, while the school is starting to discuss the issue of bullying.
sentences.translation: 这些方法有助于提高认识，并且最好与政策发展的早期阶段相结合，也就是学校刚开始讨论欺凌问题的时候。

structure.text: and can best be tied in to early phases of development
while the school is starting to discuss the issue of bullying

difficult_points: These 回指通过视频、戏剧和文学等课程方式；for 后接动名词 raising。
can be tied in to 表示与政策发展阶段相结合，best 表示最佳时机。
while 从句说明这种课程工作适合在学校开始讨论欺凌时进行。

sentences.sentence: They are also useful in renewing the policy for new pupils, or revising it in the light of experience.
sentences.translation: 这些方法也有助于面向新生重新宣导政策，或根据实践经验修订政策。

structure.text: renewing the policy for new pupils
or revising it in the light of experience

difficult_points: They 仍指课程中的反欺凌活动；renewing 和 revising 是 in 后的并列动名词。
it 回指 the policy；in the light of 表示根据已有经验重新评估。

sentences.sentence: But curriculum work alone may only have short-term effects; it should be an addition to policy work, not a substitute.
sentences.translation: 但仅靠课程活动可能只有短期效果；它应当作为政策工作的补充，而不能取而代之。

structure.text: an addition to policy work, not a substitute

difficult_points: alone 强调如果只有课程工作而缺少政策配套，效果可能不持久。
分号后 it 回指 curriculum work；not a substitute 与 an addition 构成对比。

sentences.sentence: There are also ways of working with individual pupils, or in small groups.
sentences.translation: 也有一些方法可以针对个别学生开展工作，或以小组形式进行。

structure.text: of working with individual pupils, or in small groups

difficult_points: of working... 后置说明 ways 的内容。
with individual pupils 和 in small groups 是 working 的两种并列组织方式。

expressions.meaning_zh: 针对个别学生开展工作

sentences.sentence: Assertiveness training for pupils who are liable to be victims is worthwhile, and certain approaches to group bullying such as 'no blame', can be useful in changing the behaviour of bullying pupils without confronting them directly, although other sanctions may be needed for those who continue with persistent bullying.
sentences.translation: 为容易成为受害者的学生提供自信训练是值得的；对于群体欺凌，某些方法——如“无责备法”——能够在不直接对抗欺凌者的情况下改变其行为，不过对持续欺凌的人可能还需要其他处罚。

structure.text: who are liable to be victims
and certain approaches to group bullying such as 'no blame', can be useful in changing the behaviour of bullying pupils without confronting them directly
although other sanctions may be needed for those who continue with persistent bullying

difficult_points: who 修饰 pupils；be liable to 在此表示容易面临成为受害者的风险。
and 后主语变为 certain approaches；in changing... 说明这些方法的作用，without confronting... 说明方式。
although 引出限制条件；those 指持续实施欺凌的学生，who 从句限定其范围。

sentences.sentence: Work in the playground is important, too.
sentences.translation: 在操场开展相关工作也很重要。
difficult_points: Work 是名词，指在操场进行的反欺凌管理与干预工作。
too 表示除了政策、课程和小组干预外，操场工作也同样重要。

sentences.sentence: One helpful step is to train lunchtime supervisors to distinguish bullying from playful fighting, and help them break up conflicts.
sentences.translation: 一个有效步骤是培训午餐时间的值班人员，让他们能够区分欺凌与玩闹打斗，并帮助他们制止冲突。

structure.text: to distinguish bullying from playful fighting, and help them break up conflicts

difficult_points: 第一个 to train 是不定式作表语，说明 helpful step 的具体内容。
第二个 to 后并列 distinguish 和 help；them 指 lunchtime supervisors。
distinguish A from B 表示区分两者；break up conflicts 指及时制止冲突。

sentences.sentence: Another possibility is to improve the playground environment, so that pupils are less likely to be led into bullying from boredom or frustration.
sentences.translation: 另一种做法是改善操场环境，从而降低学生因无聊或挫败感而被诱导参与欺凌的可能性。

structure.text: so that pupils are less likely to be led into bullying from boredom or frustration

difficult_points: to improve... 作表语，说明 another possibility 的具体内容。
so that 引出改善环境希望达到的结果。
be led into 是被动结构，表示被环境和情绪诱发而参与欺凌；from 引出诱因。

sentences.sentence: With these developments, schools can expect that at least the most serious kinds of bullying can largely be prevented.
sentences.translation: 随着这些措施的发展，学校可以期待，至少最严重的几类欺凌大体上能够得到预防。

structure.text: that at least the most serious kinds of bullying can largely be prevented

difficult_points: With these developments 概括前文政策、课程、个体干预和操场管理等进展。
that 从句作 expect 的宾语；can be prevented 是情态动词加被动语态。
at least 和 largely 都限制结论强度，作者没有声称所有欺凌都能彻底消失。

sentences.sentence: The more effort put in and the wider the whole school involvement, the more substantial the results are likely to be.
sentences.translation: 投入的努力越多、全校参与的范围越广，可能取得的成果就越显著。

structure.text: the wider the whole school involvement
the more substantial the results are likely to be

difficult_points: the more..., the more... 是“越……就越……”的关联比较结构。
前半部分并列两个条件：投入更多努力和扩大全校参与；effort 后的 put in 是过去分词修饰语。
are likely to be 表示结果更显著的可能性，而非绝对保证。

sentences.sentence: The reduction in bullying—and the consequent improvement in pupil happiness—is surely a worthwhile objective.
sentences.translation: 减少欺凌，并由此提升学生的幸福感，无疑是值得追求的目标。

structure.text: The reduction in bullying—and the consequent improvement in pupil happiness—
and the consequent improvement in pupil happiness

difficult_points: 破折号中的 and the consequent improvement... 补充一个由减少欺凌带来的连带目标。
整体被视为一个相互关联的目标，所以系动词用单数 is。
consequent 表示学生幸福感的提升是欺凌减少带来的结果。
